subcodes.first_line: Say: O my God, my God! I am Thy servant and the son of Thy servant. I bear witness to that which the Tongue of Thy Revelation hath testified in the dominion of Thy knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل الهی الهی انا عبدک و ابن عبدک اشهد بما شهد به لسان بیانک فی جبروت عرفانک
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
